bh_tallow_candle.name: Tallow Candle
bh_tallow_candle.description: Its guttering light keeps the whispering dark at arm's length.

bh_grave_salt.name: Pouch of Grave Salt
bh_grave_salt.description: Scatter it and the restless dead recoil. Purges what festers in the blood.

bh_mourners_veil.name: Mourner's Veil
bh_mourners_veil.description: Woven from funeral shrouds; the sorrow in it turns blades aside.

bh_reliquary_heart.name: Reliquary of the Weeping Saint
bh_reliquary_heart.description: A cold iron heart that beats once an hour, restoring the spent will of those who carry it.

bh_lantern_of_the_drowned.name: Lantern of the Drowned
bh_lantern_of_the_drowned.description: Green flame that burns even underwater. They say it lights the way back from death, but only once.
